subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! That which thou didst write to Jinab-i-Manshadi was noted. Concerning the opposition of the ignorant ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید از مقاومت نادانان
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @call to action
